# Cosmic Igloo

> Cosmic Igloo is a premium made-to-order yoga mat brand. Each mat features original sacred-geometry, mandala, and cosmic artwork, custom-designed and printed to order in the United States for serious yoga practitioners, wellness studios, and conscious gift buyers.

Cosmic Igloo is a wellness product brand — not a developer tool, code repository, or software project. The catalog is a curated set of original yoga mat designs sold direct-to-consumer at cosmicigloo.com. Mats are made-to-order, shipped from the US, and intended for daily yoga, meditation, and mindful movement.

## Pages

- [Home](/): shop the full collection of made-to-order yoga mats
- [About](/about): our story, materials, and craft
- [FAQs](/faqs): common questions about mats, shipping, and care
- [Shipping & delivery](/shipping): production and delivery times by region
- [Refund & returns](/refund-policy): policy for made-to-order items
- [Contact](/contact): get in touch with the studio
- [Blog](/blog): stories and journeys from yogis in our community

## Products

All mats below are made-to-order, 72" × 24" or as specified, printed and shipped from the US.
